_comment: Task subset for fast WorldModel evaluation (v1). Indices match LIBERO suite task ordering.
purpose: Representative subset for quantifying why baseline WM did not improve RFT.

spatial.rationale: Mix of near/far reach and bi-manual tasks typical of LIBERO-Spatial.

object.rationale: Covers pick-place, stack, and container insertion object types.

goal.rationale: Covers easy and hard goal-conditioned variants.

long.rationale: Two long-horizon tasks; more are expensive to evaluate.

phase0_all._comment: Full-suite Phase 0: all tasks for comprehensive per-task analysis. Used with TASK_SCOPE=all.

spatial.rationale: All 10 LIBERO-Spatial tasks for complete Phase 0 coverage.

small_run._comment: Minimal subset for smoke tests and quick iteration.
